fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly truncates the last byte from the stitched payload on line 80 by using the slice `[:-1]`. The return statement should return the entire concatenated data.

spec.expr: len(data__1[:-1]) == sum(len(part) for _, part in chunk_list__2)

constraints.intent: The length of the data being returned must match the total length of all input chunks.

spec.expr: all(chunk_list__2[i][0] <= chunk_list__2[i+1][0] for i in range(len(chunk_list__2) - 1))

constraints.intent: The list of chunks must be sorted by their integer index before concatenation.
The simple concatenation logic should only run when no separator is provided.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) >= sum(len(part) for _, part in chunks)

constraints.intent: The final payload must contain at least all bytes from the original chunks.
